      "question": "What is the primary concern when using AI in healthcare to make life-or-death decisions?",
      "options": ["A) Patient data privacy", "B) AI algorithm bias", "C) Medical malpractice liability", "D) AI system downtime"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Medical malpractice liability is a concern because AI systems can make decisions that may lead to medical errors or harm to patients. The healthcare providers may be held liable for the action
